metadata.authority: Owner: Salman Ahmed bin Salman Al-Rajhi
metadata.islamic_foundation: Quran & Sunnah - Al-Amanah (Trust), Al-Aqd (Contract), Al-Taraddi (Mutual Consent)

vision.statement: بناء منظومة ديجيتال إسلامية عالمية تحقق العدل الاقتصادي والابتكار التقني بأمانة وشفافية
vision.english: Building a global Islamic digital ecosystem that achieves economic justice and technological innovation with integrity and transparency

pillars.name: Al-Amanah (التأمين)
pillars.description: كل معاملة تقوم على الأمانة والصدق - No deception, no fraud, complete integrity in all transactions

pillars.name: Al-Adl (العدل)
pillars.description: العدل حتى لو بيننا وبين أنفسنا - Fair distribution, transparent algorithms, equitable partnership models

pillars.name: Al-Itqan (الإتقان)
pillars.description: إن الله يحب إذا عمل أحدكم عملاً أن يتقنه - Built-in quality, AI-powered optimization, continuous improvement

pillars.name: At-Taraddi (التراضي)
pillars.description: البيع عن تراضٍ منكما - All partnerships must be voluntary, consensual, with full information

pillars.name: Al-Kahf (الكهف)
pillars.description: حماية الملكية الفكرية والبيانات الخاصة - Protect data, IP, privacy as fundamental rights

primary_objectives.yardstick: Partnerships across: Tech (Google, Microsoft, Apple), Finance (Banks, Fintechs), Commerce (E-commerce, Logistics), Government (Saudi, GCC regulators)
primary_objectives.kpi: Partner satisfaction ≥ 90%, contract closure rate ≥ 85%, integration success ≥ 95%

primary_objectives.yardstick: Sheikha Search, SheikhaTube, SheikhaMail, SheikhaDrive, Maps, Workspace, Ads, Analytics, AI Studio
primary_objectives.kpi: 9 products live, 100M+ users engaged, revenue target $500M+ by 2030

primary_objectives.yardstick: Federated infrastructure across Google, Microsoft, NVIDIA, AWS with fallback mechanisms
Halal-certified algorithms, Sharia-compliant contracts, Zakat automation, Riba-free models
primary_objectives.kpi: Fatwa council approval, OIC recognition, AAOIFI compliance

primary_objectives.yardstick: 25 AI bots managing 25 departments with 113 human employees in support roles
primary_objectives.kpi: Bot autonomy ≥ 90%, decision transparency 100%, human oversight always available

targets.strategic_value: BigQuery, Vertex AI, App Engine, Cloud Storage
targets.mutual_benefit: Google gains: Islamic finance market, enterprise ecosystem. Sheikha gains: Cloud infrastructure, AI models

targets.strategic_value: Azure Cognitive Services, Copilot integration, enterprise applications
targets.mutual_benefit: Microsoft gains: Arabic-native ecosystem, Sharia compliance. Sheikha gains: AI services, enterprise tools

targets.strategic_value: GPU computing, CUDA runtime, enterprise AI infrastructure
targets.mutual_benefit: NVIDIA gains: Market penetration in Islamic enterprise. Sheikha gains: GPU optimization, performance

targets.strategic_value: Payment rails, regulatory approval, fintech integration
targets.mutual_benefit: Bank gains: Fintech ecosystem, digital payments volume. Sheikha gains: Banking licenses, trust

targets.strategic_value: Mobile integration, SMS, cellular data, enterprise telecom
targets.mutual_benefit: Telco gains: High-revenue digital services customer. Sheikha gains: Mobile reach, distribution
E-comm platform gains: Payment, logistics, analytics tools. Sheikha gains: Seller base, transaction volume

targets.partner_name: General Authority for Statistics (GaStat) / Ministry of Commerce
targets.mutual_benefit: Government gains: Digital ecosystem partner for Vision 2030. Sheikha gains: Regulatory clarity, mandates

targets.strategic_value: Sharia certification, Zakat standards, Islamic finance models
targets.mutual_benefit: Academy gains: Technology partner for Islamic finance modernization. Sheikha gains: Fatwa authority, trust

tier_2_integration.description: AI models, APIs, services, feature integrations

partnership_positioning.market_positioning: Islamic-first, Sharia-compliant, autonomous AI-powered, transparent, trustworthy alternative to secular big tech (Google, Meta, Amazon)
competitive_advantage: Religious legitimacy through Quranic & Sunnah principles
Built-in Zakat, Halal certifications, Islamic finance models
Autonomous AI governance with human oversight
Transparent algorithms audited by both engineers and Sharia scholars
partnership_positioning.value_proposition_for_partners: Access to 2B+ Muslim market, Sharia-certified infrastructure, sustainable Islamic economy models, ESG compliance (religious dimension)

partnership_health.metric_5: Dispute Resolution Rate - Target: 0 escalations to court (all mediated)

guiding_principles.principle_1: كل متعاقد ملتزم بالأمانة وحفظ السر
guiding_principles.principle_1_en: Every partner is bound by trust and confidentiality
guiding_principles.principle_2: لا يجوز التعامل على أساس غرر أو غش أو احتيال
guiding_principles.principle_2_en: No deception, fraud, or hidden terms are permitted
guiding_principles.principle_3: الشرط الحرام يلغي العقد أو ينقصه
guiding_principles.principle_3_en: Unlawful conditions void or diminish contracts
guiding_principles.principle_4_en: Justice is mandated even with adversaries
guiding_principles.principle_5: كل اتفاقية تخضع للمراجعة الشرعية والقانونية
guiding_principles.principle_5_en: All agreements undergo Islamic legal and regulatory review
